pain.title: Do you recognize yourself?
items: Revenue has stagnated for months or years
You work 70+ hours a week and results don't change
No digital presence — the competition is stealing your customers
Costs rise, profits fall — you don't know why
No time to innovate, market or grow
pain.conclusion: The problem is not the market. The problem is the missing system.

quiz.title: Quick Diagnosis
quiz.subtitle: 7 questions · 3 minutes · Instant result

questions.q: Can you explain in one sentence what makes your business unique?
Does your business generate real profit every month?
Could you be away for a week without everything stopping?
Do you have an active online marketing system?
Do you regularly organize events or special promotions?
Do you have a clear growth plan for the next 12 months?
